purpose: Audit organ life zone representation without claiming full semantic authority.

rows.pass_condition: REQUIRED_9_ORGANS_V0_1.json contains exactly nine unique required organs.
Every required organ root_path and life_zone_path exists.
Task-required zones exist for Administratum, Strategium, Schola, Inquisition, and Custodes.
Missing identity/task participation metadata is reported as warning, not hidden.
